news.title: OpenAI Reportedly Faces Legal And Regulatory Storm As States Probe AI Safety and Consumer Protections Ahead Of IPO
news.description:
OpenAI is reportedly facing a multi-state investigation as attorneys general examine the company’s data practices, safety measures and the potential impact of its artificial intelligence products on consumers ahead of its anticipated initial public offering.

news.description:

news.title: US government orders Anthropic to kill Fable 5 and Mythos 5 in unprecedented AI model recall

news.title: Anthropic cuts access to AI models over US 'national security' order
news.description: Anthropic said on June 12 it has suspended access to two powerful AI models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, to comply with a US national security order.
